description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, lying flat on his back with arms relaxed at his sides and legs extended. He is dressed in a casual, long-sleeved plaid shirt and a pair of fitted jeans, both of which appear slightly wrinkled, suggesting a relaxed or everyday context. His feet are bare, and his toes are visible, indicating he is not wearing any footwear. The figure's hair is short and neatly styled, and his facial features are mature, with a calm, neutral expression. The clothing fits closely to the body, showing the contours of the torso and limbs. The overall appearance is that of a typical urban pedestrian in casual attire, suitable for a variety of city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male lying on his back, wearing a plaid shirt and jeans with bare feet and short hair.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the plaid shirt, short hair, and the full length of the body with arms at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the relaxed arm, and the side seam of the jeans.
description_view_2: View from the feet, emphasizing the bare soles, extended legs, and the front of the shirt and face.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm, and the side of the jeans and shirt.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved button-up shirt and straight-leg jeans
attribute_posture: lying flat on back with arms at sides and legs extended
